conditions:
state_vars_done \/ actions_done \/ inv_verifiers_done \/
     inv_assertions_done \/ traces_done) => spec_parsed
ParsePrecedesTranslations.message:
ParsePrecedesTranslations violation: (state_vars_done \/ actions_done \/ inv_verifiers_done \/
     inv_assertions_done \/ traces_done) => spec_parsed

AllTranslationsPrecedeWrite violation: artifact_written =>
        (state_vars_done /\ actions_done /\ inv_verifiers_done /\
         inv_assertions_done /\...

PipelineIntegrity violation: artifact_uploaded =>

assert_ValidPhase.description: Test assertion for ValidPhase from BridgeJob spec

assert_NoLLMInvoked.description: Test assertion for NoLLMInvoked from BridgeJob spec

assert_NoSubprocessInvoked.description: Test assertion for NoSubprocessInvoked from BridgeJob spec

assert_ParsePrecedesTranslations.condition:
(state_vars_done or actions_done or inv_verifiers_done or
     inv_assertions_done or traces_done) implies spec_parsed
assert_ParsePrecedesTranslations.message:
Assertion failed: ParsePrecedesTranslations — (state_vars_done \/ actions_done \/ inv_verifiers_done \/
     inv_assertions_done \/ traces_done) => spec_parsed
assert_ParsePrecedesTranslations.description: Test assertion for ParsePrecedesTranslations from BridgeJob spec

assert_AllTranslationsPrecedeWrite.condition:
artifact_written implies
        (state_vars_done and actions_done and inv_verifiers_done and
         inv_assertions_done and traces_done)
assert_AllTranslationsPrecedeWrite.message:
Assertion failed: AllTranslationsPrecedeWrite — artifact_written =>
        (state_vars_done /\ actions_done /\ inv_verifiers_done /\
         inv_assertions_done /\...
assert_AllTranslationsPrecedeWrite.description: Test assertion for AllTranslationsPrecedeWrite from BridgeJob spec

assert_WritePrecedesUpload.description: Test assertion for WritePrecedesUpload from BridgeJob spec

assert_CompletionRequiresUpload.description: Test assertion for CompletionRequiresUpload from BridgeJob spec

assert_PipelineIntegrity.condition:
artifact_uploaded implies
        (artifact_written and traces_done and inv_assertions_done and
         inv_verifiers_done and actions_done and state_vars_done and spec_parsed)
assert_PipelineIntegrity.message:
Assertion failed: PipelineIntegrity — artifact_uploaded =>
        (artifact_written /\ traces_done /\ inv_assertions_done /\
         inv_verifiers_done /...
assert_PipelineIntegrity.description: Test assertion for PipelineIntegrity from BridgeJob spec

assert_InputFilesRequiredForParse.condition:
(phase not in {"dequeued"}) implies
        (spec_file_present and traces_file_present and sim_traces_file_present)
assert_InputFilesRequiredForParse.description: Test assertion for InputFilesRequiredForParse from BridgeJob spec

assert_CompletionRequiresArtifact.description: Test assertion for CompletionRequiresArtifact from BridgeJob spec

assert_SafeTermination.description: Test assertion for SafeTermination from BridgeJob spec
